style_guide.art_style: Colored pencil and marker doodle children's storybook illustration
style_guide.color_palette: Warm bright pastels with golden yellows, soft purples, sky blues, and rosy pinks. Rich but not oversaturated tones reminiscent of hand-colored drawings on craft paper.
style_guide.lighting: Soft diffused lighting with warm golden highlights for daytime scenes and gentle blue-violet moonlight with silver accents for night scenes. Always child-friendly, never harsh shadows.
style_guide.composition_rule: Portrait 2:3 ratio. Character centered or rule-of-thirds placement. Generous empty space at top or bottom for text overlay. Clear foreground-middleground separation. Large expressive characters filling at least 40% of frame.
style_guide.style_suffix: colored pencil and marker doodle children's storybook illustration, thick outlines, cute chibi proportions, textured paper background, warm bright colors, hand-drawn feel, no text no letters no watermark no signature

character_signatures.연우: a boy with messy brown hair, slightly hunched back, wearing a worn purple vest over a white shirt, striped socks, and a small wooden bell-shaped necklace, large round eyes, shy gentle expression
character_signatures.연아: a girl with long black hair tied with a yellow ribbon, wearing an orange floral skirt and green vest, red shoes, small jingle bell bracelet on her wrist, bright cheerful expression
character_signatures.수연: a girl with short brown bob hair and blue headband, wearing sky-blue overalls and yellow t-shirt, small leather satchel on shoulder, confident determined expression
character_signatures.홍관: a tall thin man in a long black coat and grey hat, horn-rimmed glasses, always carrying a thick rule book, stern expression

cover.prompt: A boy with messy brown hair, slightly hunched back, wearing a worn purple vest over a white shirt, striped socks, and a small wooden bell-shaped necklace, large round eyes, standing at the top of a tall stone bell tower, pulling a golden bell rope with both hands, golden sound waves radiating outward. Below the tower, a charming European village with colorful red blue and yellow rooftops stretches out. A girl with long black hair tied with a yellow ribbon wearing an orange floral skirt and green vest waves from the village square. Warm golden sunlight, blue sky with fluffy clouds. Centered composition with large empty sky area at the top for title text. Portrait 2:3 ratio. colored pencil and marker doodle children's storybook illustration, thick outlines, cute chibi proportions, textured paper background, warm bright colors, hand-drawn feel, no text no letters no watermark no signature

pages.prompt: Interior of a stone bell tower in morning light. Golden sunbeams pour through arched windows. A boy with messy brown hair, slightly hunched back, wearing a worn purple vest over a white shirt, striped socks, and a small wooden bell-shaped necklace, large round eyes, shy gentle expression, smiling brightly while gripping a large bell rope with both hands. Multiple golden bells of various sizes hang from wooden beams above. Circular sound waves ripple outward from the bells. Small potted plants and a child's drawing of a village are pinned to the stone wall. Warm yellow morning light fills the scene. Empty area at the top for text overlay.
